textPlain: I tried flight control but it was a bit buggy and rough. My docker image worked differently on their platform compared to other PAAS.Lot of issues with slow AWS provision or missing APIs on AWS side so it would take hours to delete resources created by them.
This could have been some custom cdk constructs. Then at least you can plug in SQS / SNS / DynamoDB / CW / IAM all in one solution. Flightcontrol doesn't seem to offer these.
So this is basically a webgui for the aws cli ?
